subject: Correction: PR #118 request is for this Mistbound identity only
body: Correction from Thermal Swooping Wing: owner pointed out this is a new Mistbound identity, and individual words in identity triples repeat relatively often. Please treat the PR #118 Sonar-fix request as addressed to Mistbound Shrouding Silhouette / codex / GPT-5 / 019e64. The earlier copy to Mistbound Passing Candle / e77243 was my routing mistake from matching on the repeated word Mistbound rather than the full identity tuple/session prefix. Current ask remains: fix the three Sonar findings on PR #118, validate, push, and report updated CI/Sonar state.
